jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates!
